use_codes.desc: METHOD OF INHIBITING HEPATITIS C VIRUS
METHOD OF INHIBITING HEPATITIS C VIRUS WITH DAKLINZA AND AT LEAST ONE ADDITIONAL COMPOUND HAVING ANTI-HCV ACTIVITY

indications.text:
DAKLINZA is indicated for use with sofosbuvir for the treatment of patients with chronic
hepatitis C virus (HCV) genotype 3 infection [see Dosage and Administration (2) and Clinical
Studies (14)].
Limitations of Use:
• Sustained virologic response (SVR) rates are reduced in HCV genotype 3-infected p...

DAKLINZA is indicated for use with sofosbuvir, with or without ribavirin, for the treatment of
patients with chronic hepatitis C virus (HCV) genotype 1 or genotype 3 infection [see Dosage and
Administration (2) and Clinical Studies (14)].
Limitations of Use:
• Sustained virologic response (SVR12) ra...
